[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101100 3
1 111010011 6
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 010000100 2
5 001111000 4
6 001100101 4
7 000000110 2
